Getting Started

This fixture represents a static documentation site with sidebar navigation, headings, code blocks, and tables.

Installation

Install the tool using your preferred method:

cargo install plumb-cli

System Requirements

ComponentMinimumRecommended
Rust1.75stable
Chrome120stable

Configuration

Create a plumb.toml file in your project root:

[rules]
spacing = "warn"
contrast = "error"

API Reference

The primary entry point is plumb lint <url>. See the full reference for details.
